player0:
import math

# Constants
VELOCITY = 22
SENSITIVITY = 0.3
CAMERA_DISTANCE = 5
JUMP_FORCE = 12
FOV_FORWARD = 80
FOV_NORMAL = 60
FOV_BACKWARD = 40

yaw, pitch = 0, 0
grounded = False
entity.visible = True

def spherical_to_cartesian(radius, yaw, pitch):
    x = radius * math.cos(math.radians(yaw)) * math.cos(math.radians(pitch))
    y = radius * math.sin(math.radians(pitch))
    z = radius * math.sin(math.radians(yaw)) * math.cos(math.radians(pitch))
    return Vector3(x, y, z)

def get_camera_direction():
    direction = camera.front
    direction.y = 0
    return direction

def is_moving_forward_backwards():
    return IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_W) or IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_S)

def update_camera_fovy():
    if IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_W):
        camera.fovy = Lerp(camera.fovy, FOV_FORWARD, time.dt)
    elif IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_S):
        camera.fovy = Lerp(camera.fovy, FOV_BACKWARD, time.dt)
    else:
        camera.fovy = Lerp(camera.fovy, FOV_NORMAL, time.dt)

def update_camera_rotation():
    global yaw, pitch
    yaw += GetMouseMovement().x * SENSITIVITY
    pitch += GetMouseMovement().y * SENSITIVITY
    pitch = max(-89, min(89, pitch))

def update_camera_position():
    global yaw, pitch
    offset = spherical_to_cartesian(CAMERA_DISTANCE, yaw, pitch)
    camera.position = entity.position + offset
    camera.look_at = entity.position
    camera.up = Vector3(0, 1, 0)


def check_ground():
    global grounded
    ray = Raycast(entity.position, Vector3(0, -1, 0), ignore=[entity])
    grounded = ray.hit and ray.distance < 1.25

def set_entity_rotation():
    global yaw
    front = get_camera_direction()
    entity_rotation_yaw = math.degrees(math.atan2(front.z, front.x)) + 90
    entity.rotation.y = -entity_rotation_yaw

def handle_movement():
    global yaw, pitch, grounded

    direction = get_camera_direction()

    if IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_W):
        entity.applyImpulse(direction * time.dt * VELOCITY)
    if IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_S):
        entity.applyImpulse(camera.back * time.dt * VELOCITY)
    if IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_A):
        entity.applyImpulse(camera.left * time.dt * VELOCITY)
    if IsKeyDown(Keys.KEY_D):
        entity.applyImpulse(camera.right * time.dt * VELOCITY)

    if IsKeyPressed(Keys.KEY_SPACE):
        entity.applyImpulse(Vector3(0, JUMP_FORCE, 0))

    update_camera_fovy()

def update():
    print("PLAYER")
    if (grounded):
        handle_movement()
    update_camera_rotation()
    update_camera_position()
    check_ground()
    set_entity_rotation()

mov_platf_z1:
origin = entity.position
dist = 20
speed = 2.0
direction = 1

def update():
    print("PLATFORM")
    global direction

    entity.position = entity.position + Vector3(0, 0, direction * speed * time.dt)

    if entity.position.z > origin.z + dist:
        direction = -1
    elif entity.position.z < origin.z:
        direction = 1

mov_platf_y2:
origin = entity.position
dist = 20
speed = 2.0
direction = 1

def update():
    print("PLATFORM")
    global direction

    entity.position = entity.position + Vector3(0, direction * speed * time.dt, 0)

    if entity.position.y > origin.y + dist:
        direction = -1
    elif entity.position.y < origin.y:
        direction = 1
